creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Hi

I wanted to ask if net/kea failed to build because something in the dependency chain requires lang/gcc at some point.

On PPC64 10.3-RELEASE (iMac G5) I ran into the same error message when running poudriere building X11 related ports that require lang/gcc.

Since I had the very same error message when trying to build a couple of X11-related ports which require lang/gcc on PPC64, I wanted to ask if you can confirm that lang/gcc is failing due to an induced dependency since that would point the issue towards lang/gcc instead of net/kea.

-- Mathieu
